name: Salmon "in My Style
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------WHITE WINE SAUCE-------------------------------
1. In a saute pan, heat 2 tablespoons of butter.
2. Add the shallots and mushrooms to the butter, cook for about two minutes.
3. Stir in 1 cup of fish fume and 1 cup of white wine.
4. Cook for approximately five more minutes.
5. Gradually add cream until the sauce is thickened (the sauce should be whiter than gray).
6. Reduce the sauce over low heat for an additional 20 minutes, then strain through a chinois.
7. Reduce again for 3 to 4 more minutes until the sauce reaches desired thickness.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
FISH:
------
1. Slice salmon into filets at an angle, approximately 1 to 1 1/2 inches thick.
2. Pound the fillets under damp paper and store in parchment paper until ready to cook.
3. Lightly season the inside and outside of the salmon with salt.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons of butter in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
5. When the butter is hot, add the salmon to the pan without stirring.
6. Cook briefly (three to four minutes) until opaque on all sides.
7. Turn the fillets once and continue cooking for another three or four minutes.
8. Remove from heat, turn one last time to coat with some juices.
9. To serve, arrange the salad in the center of a plate, place the salmon on top, and drizzle with sauce.
Garnish with red basil leaves.
